visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with reddish hair wearing a black jacket with crane embroidery over a white shirt stands in an outdoor park with green grass and trees, gesturing and talking towards the camera with high energy. (2) Extreme close-up of a silver and purple product box labeled 'GREEN GOLD Kudzu Flower' and three small beige pills being held in a palm. (3) The man eats a piece of fried chicken with an exaggerated expression; a woman in a white cardigan and a man in a green sweater stand behind him, also holding chicken. (4) The man displays a golden box while two women appear in a separate scene holding various product packages and smiling brightly. (5) Close-up shots show the intricate gold patterns on a black box and then a single yellow pill with the letter 'G' embossed on it resting on a wooden surface. (6) The man returns to the park setting, holding the products and pointing at the camera excitedly as yellow and white text overlays flash across the screen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: in士林北投. [Slogan]: 炸雞路跑. [Variety]: 嘎哥優惠碼GA95. (2) [Subtitle]: 是不是很怕圓. [Slogan]: GREENGOLD 葛花纖. (3) [Subtitle]: 1天2顆 大餐前最多4顆. [Variety]: 促進循環. (4) [Variety]: 幫助消化. [Slogan]: 三段式化解. (5) [Slogan]: GREENGOLD9週年祭 全館最低5折起. (6) [Slogan]: 指定套組還送免費體驗 不滿意可以全退. (7) [Variety]: GA95 (英文大寫) 再打95折.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, 1 male friend, 1 female friend in background, 2 female models in promotional cut.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male with dyed reddish-brown hair, wearing a black satin-like jacket with white crane embroidery and a white inner t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor park with mature trees, green lawns, paved walking paths, and distant city buildings/traffic.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male narration begins with a rapid speech rate and bright pitch. Upbeat electronic pop BGM with a steady 4/4 beat enters. A 'whoosh' SFX signals the start. (2) A 'pop' SFX accompanies the visual transition to the product box. The narrator emphasizes the brand name with increased volume. (3) A distinct 'crunch' sound occurs as a piece of chicken is bitten, followed by a 'boing' cartoon sound effect. (4) The narrator transitions into promo details with a 'ding' SFX. Music maintains constant energy. Short bursts of 'whoosh' sounds separate the promo points. (5) Background female laughter is briefly heard as the narrator jokes. A 'sparkle' SFX plays during the close-up of the yellow pill. (6) The vocal intensity reaches a peak for the final call to action, accompanied by a riser-style SFX leading to the end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Promotion -> Technical Details -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a high-energy advertisement designed to promote Green Gold health supplements. It uses a comedic 'fried chicken run' scenario to illustrate the product's benefits in managing diet and metabolism, followed by a dense list of anniversary discounts and giveaways.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator repeatedly holds the product, demonstrates its use, and provides a specific discount code (GA95).

high_inference.freeDescribe: A classic example of Taiwanese creator-led social media advertising, blending lifestyle vlog elements with high-frequency editing and variety-show graphics.
